issues.sample: WHILE FEATHERING THE FRONT BRAKE OF THE BRAND NEW MOTORCYCLE, TO MODULATE THE BIKE'S SPEED BEFORE APPROACHING A TRAFFIC LIGHT, BRAKE LEVER BECAME MUSHY. SUBSEQUENT APPLICATION OF THE BRAKE LEVER RESULTED IN NO BRAKING / REDUCED BRAKING FORCE. THE SAME APPLICATION OF BRAKING POWER
